title: begonia subcostata
intro: Begonia subcostata is a species of flowering plant in the family Begoniaceae, commonly known as the Polynesian Begonia or Dragon Wing Begonia. This plant is valued for its ornamental leaves and stems, but it also has potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Begonia subcostata include reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used as a tea or tincture, or applied topically in the form of a salve or cream, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
